mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, failed_login_count, locked_until, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{failedLoginCount}, #{lockedUntil}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET failed_login_count = #{failedLoginCount}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, failed_login_count = #{failedLoginCount}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE users SET avatar_audit_status = #{avatarAuditStatus}, avatar_audit_remark = #{avatarAuditRemark}, avatar_audited_by = #{avatarAuditedBy}, avatar_audited_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
